goal_text:
You want to book a 'taxi'. The taxi should 'arrive by 07:30' and should depart from 'leverton house'.
The taxi should go to 'jesus college'.
Make sure you get 'car type' and 'contact number'.

message: You want to book a taxi. The taxi should arrive by 07:30 and should depart from leverton house
The taxi should go to jesus college
Make sure you get car type and contact number
